subtitles.original: だから不意にピッチ外れるんです
subtitles.english: That's why I suddenly go off-pitch

subtitles.original: その目に映らないだけだって
subtitles.english: Just because you can't see it in your eyes,

subtitles.original: やる気はメーター振り切って
subtitles.english: my motivation's off the charts!

subtitles.original: いつでも全力で夢見て
subtitles.english: Always dreaming with all my might,

subtitles.original: その分全力で眠って
subtitles.english: and sleeping with all my might to match!

subtitles.original: ヤリ ちょい痩せた 調子づいて喰った
subtitles.english: Sweet! I lost some weight, so I got carried away and ate,

subtitles.original: それだけでなんで？敗北感
subtitles.english: and now why do I feel so defeated just from that?

subtitles.original: すかさずに目標 下方修正して
subtitles.english: Without delay, I lower my expectations,

subtitles.original: 柔軟に臨機応変 七変化が勝ち
subtitles.english: flexible and adaptable, versatility wins!

subtitles.original: Please don't say "You are lazy"
subtitles.english: Please don't say "You are lazy"

subtitles.original: だって本当はcrazy
subtitles.english: 'Cause in truth, I'm crazy

subtitles.original: 孔雀たちはそう
subtitles.english: Just like peacocks,

subtitles.original: ここぞというとき美を魅せるんです
subtitles.english: they show off their beauty when the time is right!

subtitles.original: 五臓六腑 満身 邁進
subtitles.english: Through body and soul, pushing forward with all our might,

subtitles.original: 願望は痩身 麗人
subtitles.english: wishing to be slender beauties!

subtitles.original: 誘惑多発だし...
subtitles.english: With temptations everywhere...

subtitles.original: だからやけに意志砕けちゃうんです
subtitles.english: it's no wonder my willpower crumbles so easily.

subtitles.original: ヤバ まさか赤点！？ いや ギリクリア！
subtitles.english: Oh crap, a failing grade?! No, I barely passed!

subtitles.original: それだけでなんて全能感
subtitles.english: Just that alone makes me feel invincible!

subtitles.original: 大事なのは自分 認めてくこと
subtitles.english: The important thing is to accept yourself,

subtitles.original: 自分を許さなきゃ 他人も許せない
subtitles.english: if you can't forgive yourself, you can't forgive others.

subtitles.original: Please don't say "You are lazy"
subtitles.english: Please don't say "You are lazy"

subtitles.original: だって本当はcrazy
subtitles.english: 'Cause in truth, I'm crazy

subtitles.original: 白鳥たちはそう
subtitles.english: Just like swans,

subtitles.original: 見えないとこでバタ足するんです
subtitles.english: paddling furiously beneath the surface where you can't see!

subtitles.original: 本能に従順 忠実
subtitles.english: Obedient and faithful to our instincts,

subtitles.original: 翻弄も重々承知
subtitles.english: fully aware we might get played around,

subtitles.original: 前途洋々だし...
subtitles.english: our future is bright...

subtitles.original: だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです
subtitles.english: so that's why we take breaks once in a while!

subtitles.original: もうすぐ時計は6時
subtitles.english: The clock is about to strike six,

subtitles.original: もうそこに一番星
subtitles.english: and the first star is already out.

subtitles.original: 影を踏んで 夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
subtitles.english: Stepping on my shadow, I want to fade into the night on my way home.

subtitles.original: どんなに探してみても
subtitles.english: No matter how much I search,

subtitles.original: 一つしかない星
subtitles.english: there's only one star.

subtitles.original: 何億光年 離れたところからあんなに輝く
subtitles.english: Shining so brightly from billions of light-years away...

subtitles.original: いいな 君は みんなから愛されて
subtitles.english: Must be nice, you are loved by everyone.

subtitles.original: 「いいや 僕は ずっと一人きりさ」
subtitles.english: "No, I've always been all alone."

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation...

subtitles.original: 星降る夜 一瞬の願い事
subtitles.english: On a star-filled night, a wish made in an instant.

subtitles.original: きらめいて
subtitles.english: Glittering,

subtitles.original: ゆらめいて
subtitles.english: swaying,

subtitles.original: 震えてるシグナル
subtitles.english: this trembling signal.

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation,

subtitles.original: 空見上げて 指を差されるような
subtitles.english: we'd look up at the sky, as if pointed out.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Deep Dive: A Personal Walkthrough**

Okay, so the goal is to generate subtitles, and I'm diving right in. First, I need to break down this video into manageable chunks, analyzing the audio and referencing the provided JSON. I've got the first performance, "Don't say 'lazy'," and the video kicks off with the lyric "だから不意にピッチ外れるんです." Immediately, I'm checking the timing: 00:00.000 to 00:01.900. I need to get the translation right: "That's why I suddenly go off-pitch" seems like a natural fit.

Moving on, I pinpoint the end of that first vocal and the start of the instrumental section. Now, AZKi's singing again: "その目に映らないだけだって やる気はメーター振り切って." Okay, let's dissect: "Just because it doesn't show in your eyes," (00:12.700 - 00:15.100) and "my motivation's already off the charts!" (00:15.100 - 00:17.900).  Precise timing is critical here.

Next up, Towa takes the lead: "いつでも全力で夢見て その分全力で眠って" from 00:23.200 to 00:28.500; I'm mapping the timing for "Always dreaming with all my might, and sleeping with all my might to match!"

I need to nail this lyric, it's a bit tricky: "ヤリ ちょい痩せた 調子づいて喰った". I have to make sure what's being shown is accurate, so the onscreen text says "ヤリ" here, not "ヤバ", so I'll go with the on-screen presentation: "Sweet! I lost some weight, so I got carried away and ate," (00:33.800 - 00:38.400). It's easy to get this off the rails if I get the lyrics wrong.

Then, Towa continues: "すかさずに目標 下方修正して" -> "Without delay, I lower my expectations," (00:44.200 - 00:49.200) and "柔軟に臨機応変 七変化が勝ち" -> "flexible and adaptable, versatility wins!" (00:49.200 - 00:55.200). We need to accurately transcribe and translate from the original lyrics, no shortcuts.

The chorus then comes in, with its signature: "Please don't say 'You are lazy'," (00:55.400 - 00:58.100)  and "'Cause in truth, I'm crazy" (00:58.100 - 01:00.600). The subtitles need to capture the same energy. Then it's just like peacocks: "they show off their beauty when the time is right!" (01:03.100 - 01:05.900). We need to get these perfect! And so many little details to check.

Next, "Through body and soul, pushing forward with all our might," (01:05.900 - 01:08.600) and "wishing to be slender beauties!" (01:08.600 - 01:11.200) I've got to make sure I get the intention of the lyrics correct. "With temptations everywhere..." (01:11.200 - 01:13.700) and "it's no wonder my willpower crumbles so easily." (01:13.700 - 01:16.800). I'm looking to make sure the audio is perfect, not to skip any details.

Okay, let's keep the pace, now on to AZKi & Towa: "Oh crap, a failing grade?! No, I barely passed!" (01:48.000 - 01:52.800) and then, "Just that alone makes me feel invincible!" (01:52.800 - 01:58.200).  Accuracy is my only goal here. Towa sings the next part: "The important thing is to accept yourself," (01:58.500 - 02:03.500) and "if you can'

responses.thoughts:
**Final Subtitle Generation - Ready to Deliver**

Alright, let's get this done, and make sure it's perfect, after that 'verification pass' message. I've broken this down into stages. First, I absorbed the instructions: generate JSON subtitles, covering two song segments – "Don't say 'lazy'" and "星座になれたら" (If I Could Be a Constellation). The critical instruction – complete regeneration due to unacceptable gaps in the first run – really drilled that in.  No room for error here. The goal is precise timings based on vocal activations, accurate Japanese transcriptions, English translations, and, importantly, *no* of closed captions (that means zero bracketed notations). Instrumental sections are off-limits, which means Zero Ghost Subtitles.

Next, I did the legwork. I meticulously analyzed the audio and visuals, marking where vocals started and stopped. I went *line by line*, from the intro to the "Don't say 'lazy'" instrumental outro, then Lui's entrance, the on-screen title text of "星座になれたら" (If I Could Be a Constellation), and on to the end of the song. Each line's start and end times were carefully noted, and the original Japanese and English translations verified and checked. I paid close attention to where the vocals began and ended. The reference JSON was a guide, but I prioritized what I was hearing in the audio, adjusting to make sure there are *no* ghost subtitles.

Now, I cross-referenced the video details and time markers. I made sure my timecodes are perfect, lining up with the vocals, not the music or other content. I checked the translations to make sure they're clear and accurate.

Finally, I mentally double-checked everything, going back through the rules and constraints. I've accounted for every vocal passage, ensuring that every piece of audio with a lyric now has a corresponding subtitle. This is a complete and precise transcript, perfectly synchronized, formatted as JSON, and I'm positive I didn't miss a single note. It's ready for delivery.
